recommended.song_name: I Want To Know What Love Is

content:
Intro:  [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
I don't know   what you've got   but it[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
plays with my emotions, I want you so much[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]
darling, I   wanna hold you near, wanna whisper sweet[/tab]

and tender in your ear
[tab]                  [ch]D6/9[/ch]
Can't stand the thought of you of you    with somebody[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bsus[/ch]                               [ch]A/C#[/ch]
else, gotta have your love, gotta have it all to myself, I say[/tab]
[tab][ch]D6/9[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
yeah, yeah, yeah yeah[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I wanna be your lover, lover, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
wanna be your lover, lover, loverboy  (2X chorus)[/tab]

Too Far gone    hard to stop    baby
your my dream in motion and I won't give up
Teasing me, with your fire
fingers on the trigger, you're the one I desire
and I get this real good feelin from nobody else
gotta have your tenderness all to myself
I say yeah, yeah, yeah yeah

Chorus a couple of times
Solo
[tab]                [ch]D6/9[/ch]
And I want you really, but the thing [/tab]

is there's nothing I can say
[tab]            [ch]Bsus[/ch]
to stop you darling from running, running away[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/C#[/ch]      [ch]D6/9[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
won't you stay, stay, stay ayyy[/tab]

Chorus a bunch of times

Ends with some sort of outro [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]

Classic, surprised nobody has put this up before
